title: SCW17 Preliminary Agenda
text:
SPRFMO
      South Pacific Regional Fisheries Management Organisation
      
      Jack Mackerel Working Group
    
  

SCW17 Preliminary Agenda
Meeting: Scientific Committee Workshop 17 (SCW17)
Focus: Jack mackerel management strategy evaluation preparation
Status: Working draft for organiser review
Source archive: SCW16 benchmark preparation site

Purpose
SCW17 is expected to carry the 2026 jack mackerel benchmark outcomes into management-strategy-evaluation work. The agenda should distinguish decisions needed for operating-model conditioning from items that can remain as diagnostics, robustness scenarios, or later SC14 documentation.


Immediate Decisions to Frame

Operating-model conditioning set and any benchmark-derived sensitivities to retain.
Recruitment-process assumptions and stock-recruitment parameter treatment.
Treatment of single-stock and two-stock hypotheses in advice development.
Performance metrics, time horizons, and risk-tolerance language.
Candidate management-procedure families and tuning targets.
Robustness scenarios and exceptional-circumstances meta-rules.
Cross-platform validation responsibilities and timetable.



Draft Programme









Day
Session
Draft focus
Expected output




Day 1
Opening and benchmark handoff
Review benchmark outcomes, accepted inputs, unresolved diagnostics, and MSE dependencies.
Agreed list of benchmark outputs that move into OM conditioning.


Day 2
Operating models
Review conditioned OMs, recruitment assumptions, stock hypotheses, and reference/robustness sets.
OM set and sensitivity classification.


Day 3
Candidate management procedures
Review candidate MPs, data streams, tuning targets, constraints, and implementation status.
Shortlist of MPs for evaluation.


Day 4
Performance metrics and trade-offs
Review conservation, yield, stability, and exceptional-circumstances metrics.
Agreed performance metrics and presentation format.


Day 5
Recommendations and report drafting
Resolve remaining decisions, assign drafting tasks, and agree SC14 documentation path.
Draft recommendations and action table.

Setup Notes

Keep final public artifacts in docs/ and source documents in doc/.
Keep bulky model outputs, temporary render folders, and transferred meeting packages outside this repository unless they are intentionally published.
Link back to the SCW16 preparation archive rather than copying benchmark outputs into this repository.

title: SPRFMO SCW17
text:
SPRFMO
      South Pacific Regional Fisheries Management Organisation
      
      Jack Mackerel Working Group
    
  

SCW17 Preparation Materials

Overview
This site is the working index for SPRFMO Scientific Committee Workshop 17 (SCW17) jack mackerel preparation materials. It is intentionally lean: source documents live in doc/, rendered website files live in docs/, and large model outputs or meeting-transfer folders should remain outside the repository unless they are deliberate public artifacts.
SCW17 follows the 2026 benchmark work compiled in the SCW16 preparation repository and is expected to focus on management-strategy-evaluation inputs, operating-model conditioning, candidate management procedures, performance metrics, robustness scenarios, and documentation for SC14.


Current Documents

SCW17 preliminary agenda (QMD)



Source Links

SCW16 and benchmark preparation archive
SCW16 prep repository
Jack mackerel assessment repository



Working Checklist

Confirm official SCW17 dates, venue, and meeting mode.
Assign document numbers and lead authors.
Add agreed agenda sessions and expected decisions.
Add links to circulated working papers as they become available.
Render and publish the site before circulating links to participants.
